text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, September 22. No work meetings today. You have Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center and Ethan's soccer practice scheduled.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Ethan's team played a match and won 1-0! The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Busy day for sports! What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Doing some cleaning around the house. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Good call on checking that. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Played golf with Jake Morrison today. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Neighborhood connections are fun. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Bedtime can be a challenge. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Researching rover power systems in depth. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. I've indexed the research notes. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Planning our weekly meals today. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Healthy choices are great. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Listening to a podcast in the garage. My starting running back is questionable. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Personal time is valuable. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan's team played a match and won 1-0! It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. That's a big step. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: The kitchen sink area has a problem. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Automations are great when they work. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Planning a street block party soon. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Neighborhood connections are fun. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Toddlers are full of energy. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Modified the smart-home alert integrations. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. Space science and tech is a great focus. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Sarah found a new recipe to try. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's organize the menu. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: I've adjusted the local settings. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Spent some quality time stargazing with the telescope. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
